description: 林逸 — 看到搞笑場面（別人崩潰、腦補）時大笑。手捂肚子，眼角帶笑。
prompt: anime style male cultivator, young man early 20s, amber/gold themed casual robes with circuit-line patterns, messy dark hair, round glasses slightly askew, laughing out loud with eyes squeezed shut and wide grin, one hand holding stomach, half-body portrait, transparent background, solid magenta #FF00FF background
